steps.title: Use the given x-value
steps.content:
The system already gives $x=4$. Substitute $4$ into the second equation:
$$-3x+y=-5$$
$$-3(4)+y=-5$$

steps.title: Desmos graph check
steps.content: Graph the vertical line $x=4$ and the line $y=3x-5$. Their intersection is $(4,7)$.

steps.title: Find x + y
steps.content:
$$x+y=4+7=11$$
That matches choice C, so C is correct.
